title: True Performance
description: Made for the highest performance and very little else. This Modpack Powered by VulkanMod delivers incredible FPS more than 2X most others.
body:
# Summary

Using a plethera of mods this pack achieves astonishing performance.

This **Client-Side** pack was designed for insane performance and compatability with any OS.

## Important

It is **NOT** recommended to modify the pack as VulkanMod doesn't have the best mod support.

Any visual bugs that may persist are a result of the VulkanMod. I have done testing with it on its own and have experienced minor visual bugs.
